children.name: Hippocampus
children.description: Hippocampus — a genus of seahorses & pipefish in the family Syngnathidae.

children.name: Hippocampus abdominalis
children.description: The big-belly seahorse or pot-bellied seahorse is one of the largest seahorse species in the world, with a length of up to 35 cm (14 in), and is the largest in Australia..

children.name: Hippocampus algiricus
children.description: The West African seahorse is a species of fish in the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus angustus
children.description: Hippocampus angustus, commonly known as the narrow-bellied seahorse, western Australian seahorse, or western spiny seahorse, is a species of marine fish of the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus barbouri
children.description: Barbour's seahorse is a species of fish of the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus bargibanti
children.description: Hippocampus bargibanti, also known as Bargibant's seahorse or the pygmy seahorse, is a seahorse of the family Syngnathidae found in the central Indo-Pacific area..

children.name: Hippocampus biocellatus
children.description: The false-eye seahorse, or flatface seahorse is a species of marine fish of the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus borboniensis
children.description: The Réunion seahorse is a synonym of Hippocampus kuda, Weber, 1913..

children.name: Hippocampus breviceps

children.name: Hippocampus camelopardalis

children.name: Hippocampus casscsio

children.name: Hippocampus comes
children.description: The tiger tail seahorse is a species of fish in the family Syngnathidae. The species was first described by Theodore Cantor in 1850. It is found in India, Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand and Vietnam.

children.name: Hippocampus coronatus
children.description: Hippocampus coronatus, commonly known as the high-crowned seahorse or crowned seahorse, is a species of fish of the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus denise
children.description: Hippocampus denise, also known as Denise's pygmy seahorse or the yellow pygmy seahorse, is a seahorse of the family Syngnathidae native to the western Pacific..

children.name: Hippocampus erectus
children.description: The lined seahorse, northern seahorse or spotted seahorse, is a species of fish that belongs to the family Syngnathidae..

children.name: Hippocampus fisheri

children.name: Hippocampus haema
children.description: Hippocampus haema, the Korean seahorse, is a seahorse of the family Syngnathidae native to the northern Pacific Ocean, and it usually lives in Sargassum and weeds on shallow soft bottom habitats from 0 to 18 m depth..
